sources.name: TTB COLA Public Registry
sources.authority: Alcohol and Tobacco Tax and Trade Bureau
limits: not always clean product family grouping

sources.name: North Carolina ABC Quarterly Price List
North Carolina ABC Daily Warehouse Stock Report
limits: proof, age, and category are hydrated from the matched NC ABC price-list row when available

sources.name: Ohio Liquor Brand Master
sources.authority: Ohio Division of Liquor Control / JobsOhio Beverage System

sources.name: Oregon Liquor and Cannabis Commission Monthly Pricing
limits: dataset freshness depends on the published Data.gov feed

sources.name: Iowa Liquor Products
sources.authority: Iowa Department of Revenue, Alcoholic Beverages Division
limits: retail value is the purchase price for stores ordering from Iowa ABD
producer/distillery is not separated from vendor

sources.name: Idaho State Liquor Division Monthly Price Book
limits: PDF text extraction is less structured than CSV or JSON
producer/distillery is not separated as a structured field

sources.name: Utah DABS Product List
sources.authority: Utah Department of Alcoholic Beverage Services
limits: does not include age statement as structured data

sources.name: Michigan Liquor Control Commission Spirits Price Book
limits: does not include age statement as structured data
vendor is not always the distillery or producer

sources.name: Alabama ABC Quarterly Price List
limits: proof/age/size are parsed from product names instead of separate source fields
some sections require conservative name/brand matching because subcategory fields are not always provided

sources.name: Montana Department of Revenue Price Disk
limits: proof and age are parsed from abbreviated product names when present
product class is encoded in the item code and still needs conservative filtering for specialty whiskey

sources.name: Mississippi ABC 2026 SPAs and Bailment Price Changes
sources.authority: Mississippi Department of Revenue Alcoholic Beverage Control
limits: Mississippi price-change and SPA documents only
prices are ABC bottle-cost observations, not consumer shelf retail
proof and age are parsed from product names when present

sources.name: West Virginia ABCA Liquor Search
sources.authority: West Virginia Alcohol Beverage Control Administration
bestFor: public search coverage for bourbon, rye, Tennessee whiskey, American whiskey, American single malt, wheat whiskey, Canadian whisky, Scotch, Irish whiskey, Japanese whisky, and broad whisky terms
limits: does not include proof or producer/distillery as structured fields

sources.name: Pennsylvania LCB Wholesale Spirits Catalog
limits: producer/distillery is not separated as a structured field
barrel-pick variants are represented as separate retail items

sources.name: Wyoming Liquor Division Liquor365 Domestic Whiskey Catalog
bestFor: bottle price estimate derived from case pack
limits: prices are source list prices divided by parsed case pack, not independent shelf observations
proof, age, and size are parsed from product names when present
producer/distillery is not separated as a structured field

sources.name: Maine Spirits Master Price List
sources.authority: Maine Spirits / Bureau of Alcoholic Beverages and Lottery Operations
limits: producer/distillery is not separated as a structured field

sources.name: Montgomery County ABS Price Book
limits: Montgomery County Maryland price book only
prices are wholesale bottle prices, not consumer shelf retail
PDF text extraction includes page-break artifacts that require conservative filtering
does not include UPC or proof as separate structured fields

sources.name: Montgomery County ABS Store Inventory and Sale Items
sources.authority: Montgomery County Alcohol Beverage Services / Open Montgomery
limits: Montgomery County Maryland ABS inventory only
total inventory is aggregate county inventory, not bottle count by store in this export
does not include UPC or producer/distillery fields

sources.name: Vermont 802Spirits Complete Price List
sources.authority: Vermont Department of Liquor and Lottery / 802Spirits
limits: PDF text extraction requires block parsing
producer/distillery is not separated as a structured field

sources.name: Texas TABC Approved Product Label Search
bestFor: registered bourbon, rye, Tennessee, American single malt, Canadian, Scotch, Irish, Japanese, and world whisky lookup
limits: Texas Open Data approved-label dataset covers product labels approved before Sept. 1, 2021; newer product registrations are searched through AIMS

sources.name: Kentucky ABC Active Brands
sources.authority: Kentucky Department of Alcoholic Beverage Control
bestFor: active bourbon, rye, Tennessee, American single malt, Canadian, and world whisky registration lookup
limits: some registrations report case-volume package sizes or omit ABV/size

sources.name: Connecticut Liquor Brands
limits: not proof except when parsed from brand name
text searches include wine/beer/cocktail false positives that require conservative filtering

sources.name: LCBO Whisky Catalog
limits: CAD prices are not U.S. retail observations
category buckets can be broad and require conservative filtering
